verses.1: The LORD reigns! Let the peoples tremble.
verses.2: The LORD is great in Zion.
verses.3: Let them praise your great and awesome name.
verses.4: The King’s strength also loves justice.
verses.6: Moses and Aaron were among his priests,
verses.7: He spoke to them in the pillar of cloud.
verses.8: You answered them, LORD our God.
